name: AI Tutoring Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for Socratic dialogue, adaptive explanations, hint generation, misconception detection, and progress feedback

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Learner profiles, mastery maps, conversation history, progress analytics, curriculum state, assessment results

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for learning analytics

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Semantic search across curriculum content, textbook passages, worked examples, and prerequisite concept graph

services.name: Static Web Apps
services.purpose: Learner-facing tutoring UI — chat interface, whiteboard, progress dashboard, parent/teacher portal

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Tutoring API — session manager, adaptive difficulty engine, mastery tracker, Socratic dialogue orchestrator

services.name: Azure AI Content Safety
services.purpose: Content moderation for learner interactions — age-appropriate filtering, prompt injection defense for minors

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, OAuth client secrets, encryption keys for learner PII, COPPA compliance credentials

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Session engagement, mastery progression rates, hint effectiveness, response latency, pedagogical quality metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine hints, encouragement, and simple Q&A — reserve GPT-4o for Socratic dialogue and misconception analysis — saves 65% on AI costs
Cache curriculum content and worked examples in AI Search — avoids regenerating standard explanations for common topics
Implement session token budgets per learner (e.g., 4K tokens/session for K-8, 8K for high school) — prevents runaway costs from unfocused conversations
Pre-compute mastery maps for standard curricula — only re-assess when learner performance triggers threshold changes
Use Static Web Apps free tier for frontend, only pay for API compute — frontend costs near-zero regardless of scale
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
